channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Microsoft spent years pushing Copilot, but now it says don’t rely on it - Digital Trends
item.description:
1. Microsoft spent years pushing Copilot, but now it says don’t rely on it  Digital Trends
  2. Microsoft says Copilot is for entertainment purposes only, not serious use — firm pushing AI hard to consumers and businesses tells users not to rely on it for important advice  Tom's Hardware
  3. Using CoPilot? Are You Entertained?  Hackaday
  4. Microsoft says Copilot for entertainment purposes only, all while pushing it for business use | 'It can make mistakes, may not work as intended' | Inshorts  Inshorts
  5. Microsoft labels Copilot 'entertainment purposes only' in Excel and PowerPoint  NewsBytes

item.description:

  4. Microsoft's LinkedIn is scanning installed browser extensions without user permission  AppleInsider

item.title: NVIDIA's Neural Texture Compression Cuts VRAM Use From 6.5 GB to 970 MB - TechPowerUp
item.description:

  4. NVIDIA talks about the future of neural rendering in games  GameGPU
